tech_business.label: Tech Business
tech_business.summary: Clean technology-business deck for product, roadmap, and architecture topics.

consulting.label: Consulting Report
consulting.summary: Conclusion-first executive style for strategy, diagnosis, and implementation decks.

data_insight.label: Data Insight
data_insight.summary: Evidence-driven style for metrics, charts, and analytical reporting.

creative_pitch.label: Creative Pitch
creative_pitch.summary: High-impact pitch style with stronger hero visuals and concise copy.

swiss_ikb.label: Swiss IKB
swiss_ikb.summary: Swiss International Style with straight edges, hairlines, and a single Klein-blue accent.

swiss_lemon.label: Swiss Lemon
swiss_lemon.summary: Swiss grid system with a high-contrast lemon-yellow accent for young, retail, and active topics.

swiss_lime.label: Swiss Lime
swiss_lime.summary: Swiss grid system with a highlighter-green accent for future, sustainability, and startup topics.

swiss_orange.label: Swiss Orange
swiss_orange.summary: Swiss grid system with safety-orange accents for industrial, warning, and decision-point decks.

editorial_ink.label: Editorial Ink
editorial_ink.summary: Magazine-like warm paper style for narrative talks, quotes, and image-led storytelling.
